/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/JsonWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/JsonReader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/XmlWriter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/HttpRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/RateLimiter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/ApiKeyAuth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/RestBridgeConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/DiscoveryBeacon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/BroadcastQueryHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/TorTunnel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/ContentStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/DlnaHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/MediaStreamer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/DlnaServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/SsdpService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/MdnsService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/QueryHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/PeerHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/StatusHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/MetricsHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/WebSocketSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AlpineRestBridge.dir/AlpineRestBridge.cpp.o -o ../bin/AlpineRestBridge  ../lib/libApplCore.a ../lib/libAlpineStackInterface.a ../lib/libDtcpStackInterface.a ../lib/libAlpineProtocol.a ../lib/libAlpineTransport.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../lib/libConfigUtils.a ../lib/libDtcp.a ../lib/libNetUtils.a ../lib/libminiupnpc.a ../lib/libThreadUtils.a ../lib/libSysUtils.a ../lib/libTransBase.a ../lib/libAppUtils.a -ldl ../lib/libspdlog.a
